segment.source: Renders one standout quote as a full-width statement block, optionally over a background image, with company logo, author avatar, name, title, and company. Use it for: a flagship customer statement from a marquee client, a case-study pull quote worth its own section, brand-endorsement highlights. Prefer 'Single Testimonial' for a quote inline in the content flow; use 'Testimonial Hero' when the quote pairs with intro copy at the page top.
